# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

---

## Type of change

* [ ] Documentation improvement
* [ ] Template change
* [ ] Skill behavior change
* [ ] Schema update
* [ ] Example update
* [ ] Other (explain)

---

## What changed

* Explain what was modified
* List affected files or sections

---

## Why this change is needed

* Explain the problem this solves
* Explain the improvement

---

## Impact

* [ ] No impact on existing users
* [ ] Backward-compatible change
* [ ] Breaking change (requires migration)

If breaking, explain:

---

## Affected areas

* [ ] Template (`TEMPLATE.md`)
* [ ] Skill (`SKILL.md`)
* [ ] Checklist (`CHECKLIST.md`)
* [ ] Rules (`RULES.md`)
* [ ] Examples
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Schema

---

## Validation

* [ ] Changes follow project philosophy
* [ ] Structure remains consistent
* [ ] No ambiguity introduced
* [ ] Documentation updated if needed

---

## Additional notes

Add any extra context if needed.
